products.name: Abstract Wall Art
products.description: A stylish 3D printed abstract wall art piece designed to enhance modern interiors. Lightweight and durable, this piece brings character and dimension to any blank wall. Printed with premium PLA filament for clean lines and lasting quality.

products.name: Minimalist Vase
products.description: A minimalist vase perfect for fresh or dried flowers. The clean geometric design fits seamlessly into modern interiors, adding a subtle touch of elegance without visual clutter.

products.name: Decorative Sculpture
products.description: Premium 3D printed sculpture with modern design and smooth finish. A conversation piece for shelves, desks, or living rooms. Carefully post-processed for a refined surface texture.

products.name: Modern Wall Clock
products.description: A modern wall clock combining functionality and stylish design. Printed shell with precision clock movement included. Fits any contemporary or Scandinavian-inspired interior.

products.name: Art Frame Set
products.description: A stylish set of frames perfect for photos or artwork display. Set of 3 matching frames in varying sizes to create a gallery wall effect.

products.name: Geometric Planter
products.description: A trendy geometric planter ideal for indoor plants. The angular faceted design creates beautiful shadow play with natural light. Drainage hole included.

products.name: Hanging Pot
products.description: Perfect hanging planter for home and balcony decoration. Comes with integrated hooks and cord for easy hanging. Ideal for trailing plants like pothos or string of pearls.

products.name: Mini Desk Planter
products.description: Small planter ideal for desks and small plants. Perfect for succulents, air plants, or small cacti. Keeps your workspace green and vibrant.

products.name: Modern Pot Set
products.description: A set of 3 beautifully designed pots for indoor decoration. Graduated sizes allow for grouping as a decorative cluster. Unified design language ties the set together perfectly.

products.name: Succulent Planter
products.description: Designed specifically for small succulent plants with a modern, low-profile look. Multiple drainage slots keep root health optimal.

products.name: Moon Lamp
products.description: A beautiful moon lamp with soft LED light for relaxing ambiance. Surface texture is mapped from real NASA lunar photographs. USB rechargeable, with warm and cool light modes.

products.name: Spiral Lamp
products.description: A stylish spiral lamp that doubles as modern home decor. The helical structure creates mesmerizing light patterns on nearby surfaces. Fitted with E14 bulb socket.

products.name: LED Table Lamp
products.description: Perfect LED lamp for study and work desks. Provides focused, eye-friendly light. Touch-sensitive base for on/off control. USB-C powered.

products.name: Night Light Cube
products.description: A cube night light with soft warm glow perfect for bedrooms and nurseries. The geometric form catches light beautifully. Battery-operated with auto-off timer.

products.name: Galaxy Lamp
products.description: Projects beautiful galaxy patterns across your ceiling and walls for stunning ambiance lighting. Multiple color modes and rotation speed. Perfect for bedrooms and home cinema spaces.

products.name: Pen Holder
products.description: Keep your desk organized with this minimalist pen holder. Holds 10–15 pens or pencils. Weighted base prevents tipping. Smooth matte finish.

products.name: Cable Organizer
products.description: A compact cable organizer to eliminate desk clutter. Adhesive base attaches to any surface. Routes up to 5 cables neatly. Clean, discreet design.

products.name: Laptop Stand
products.description: Improves posture and airflow for laptop usage. Elevates screen to eye level to reduce neck strain. Compatible with 13–17 inch laptops. Non-slip rubber pads included.

products.name: Phone Stand
products.description: Perfect for watching videos or video calls. Adjustable angle. Compatible with all phone sizes. Compact and portable for travel.

products.name: Desk Organizer Box
products.description: Multi-compartment organizer for all office essentials. Divided into 6 sections of varying sizes. Keeps pens, clips, sticky notes, and cards within easy reach.

products.name: Anime Figure – Naruto
products.description: Highly detailed Naruto figure for anime lovers and collectors. Printed at 0.1mm layer height for exceptional surface quality. Painted by hand with professional acrylics.

products.name: Dragon Model
products.description: A highly detailed dragon model for fantasy collectors. Intricate scale texture printed with precision resin technology. Display base included.

products.name: Superhero Statue
products.description: High-quality superhero statue with fine detailing. Dynamic posed action figure. Perfect display piece for desks or shelves. Individually numbered edition.

products.name: Mini Character Set
products.description: Set of 5 mini figures ideal for display. Each character is unique with individual paint detailing. Great for gifting or starting your collection.

products.name: Game Character Figure
products.description: Detailed figure inspired by popular video game characters. Exceptional accuracy to in-game models. Weighted base for stability. Collectors box packaging included.
